text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Curren Chan asks to stop by the school
store on our way home.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at this pile of cardboard! It goes all
the way over to—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wait, isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I reached out to some people I know, but with
this much...

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sorry to drag you into this, Fuji...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I assure you, it's no trouble. I just wish I could be
more of help...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... I seeeee...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe. A chance to be a good friend. ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to butt in, but you guys look like you're
having some trouble...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you two...

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Fuji, are these friends of yours? You're so
popular—no wonder you're a dorm leader.

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Well, I accidentally ordered the wrong
amount of instant ramen.

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to order a hundred packets... but I
ended up getting a hundred dozen.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Even if we return them, it's not like they'll be
picked up right away. But there's nowhere to
store them all, either.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, true. This many boxes would take up the
entire shop.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... as long as you sell all of them, there's no
problem, right?
choice_data_list:
Do you think posting something on Umastagram
would help?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... as long as you sell all of them, there's no
problem, right?
choice_data_list:
Do you think posting something on Umastagram
would help?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We've gotta help each other in times of
need! Plus...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If we do that, we'll all come out on the other side
as even better friends. ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I don't think we need any decorations or
anything. Let's just make a pyramid out of the
ramen cups.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should upload the pic to Umatter too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! That's it! And for hashtags...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Here we go! "#BondingAtTracen #Help
#InstantRamenFestival." Come and get 'em
here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter... Murmur, murmur...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Murmur, murmur... Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
This is amazing, Curren! We might actually be
able to sell it all!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. ♪ Was I helpful?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You've gone above and beyond! You're awesome,
Curren!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So this is what it means to harness the power of
social media. I'd only heard about it in passing...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: President?! What're you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I heard that a lone Umamusume was a great help
to the school store, so I came to see for myself.

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Even the president's here! Here, take the
last packet!

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text: Curren, you really do have a wonderful gift!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. You think? I'm so happy to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using her online influence, Curren Chan has
single-handedly taken care of the trouble at the
school store... and apparently gained more
followers while she was at it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, Big Bro! You're so reliable!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, Big Sis! You're so reliable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I reach out to the other trainers, and a number of
them tell me that they're interested in buying
some instant ramen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Those trainers then reach out to others, and...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, wow! A ton of people are coming? You're
the best, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, wow! A ton of people are coming? You're
the best, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Yes, thank you so much. I'm so glad I asked you
for help.
choice_data_list:
We should discuss how to handle all of the
sales.

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If trainers are buying them, it'll be
after their work finishes.

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll put in a request to stay open late
and call in some help with the regi—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um... I wanna help too!

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
What? But don't you have a curfew? Besides, you
athletes have to get your rest.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. If my trainer's working hard, then I should
too! Please!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. If my trainer's working hard, then I should
too! Please!

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text: Oh my...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! ♪ Got it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, both Curren Chan and I end up selling
ramen.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Here you are. Thank you for coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Here you are. Thank you for coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you! You have such a cute smile!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Staff
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! I'd like to check out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if it's all right, could you ring me up after
them?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: President?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. My cleat specialist told me about this. Can
I get three packe—actually, why don't we make it
four?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Coming right up! ♪ Adults sure have a bunch of
connections! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up selling all of the instant ramen. A few
days later...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
"Curren is such a delight! I'd love it if she could
partner run with my trainee sometime!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I receive messages praising Curren from my fellow
trainers one after another. Was this a part of her
plan all along?
